label: 🦖 Urzeit-Dschungel
prompt: The person from @image1 in a prehistoric jungle, posing near a dinosaur. They are wearing gender-appropriate adventure attire — for a man: an explorer shirt & cargo pants, survival tactical gear, or a jungle researcher outfit; for a woman: practical adventurer shorts & jacket, an explorer dress, or a survival field outfit. Lush prehistoric jungle with ancient flora in the background.

label: 🚀 Galaktische Odyssee
prompt: The person from @image1 in outer space — floating near a glowing nebula, on an alien planet surface, or inside a spaceship cockpit, wearing gender-appropriate sci-fi attire — for a man: a NASA-style spacesuit, a sci-fi captain's uniform, or an alien explorer suit; for a woman: a sleek sci-fi bodysuit, a female astronaut suit, or a space commander uniform. Stars and colorful nebulae in the background.

label: 🤠 Wilder Westen
prompt: The person from @image1 in an American Wild West setting — inside a saloon, on a dusty main street, or in a sun-drenched canyon, wearing gender-appropriate frontier attire — for a man: a cowboy duster coat, a sheriff's uniform, or a frontier gambler's suit; for a woman: a cowgirl riding outfit, a frontier saloon dress, or a pioneer woman's dress. Warm golden western atmosphere.

label: ⚔️ Ritter & Burgen
prompt: The person from @image1 in a medieval setting — on a castle wall, in a great hall, or at a medieval banquet table, wearing gender-appropriate medieval attire — for a man: knight armor, royal guard armor, or a nobleman's tournament tunic; for a woman: an elegant noblewoman's gown, lady knight armor, or a queen's royal dress. Stone walls and torchlight in the background.

label: 🎨 Pop-Art Comic
prompt: A stylish modern comic book illustration of the person from @image1. Pop-art style inspired by graphic novels. Bold clean ink outlines, vibrant halftone dot shading, and saturated colors. The person is placed in a fun comic scenario with retro explosive text shapes.

label: 🪩 80er-Jahre Retro
prompt: The person from @image1 at a vibrant 1980s neon party — dancing under a disco ball, holding a boombox, or roller-skating, wearing gender-appropriate 80s attire — for a man: a neon windbreaker & retro jeans, an acid-wash denim jacket, or a retro tracksuit; for a woman: leg warmers & an off-shoulder neon top, a retro miniskirt & neon blouse, or an 80s aerobics outfit. Colorful retro party atmosphere with mild analog film grain.

label: 🕶️ Cyberpunk 2077
prompt: The person from @image1 in a futuristic cyberpunk city at night — on a rain-slicked street, near a glowing terminal, or in a neon-lit bar, wearing gender-appropriate cyberpunk attire — for a man: a cybernetic jacket with glowing LED lines, techwear hoodie & cargo pants, or neon combat gear; for a woman: a cyber bodysuit with LED accents, a neon mini dress with tech accessories, or an armored jacket & skirt. Neon signs and rain-reflected lights in the background.

label: 🏝️ Piraten-Abenteuer

label: 🔱 Unterwasser-Atlantis

label: 🏯 Samurai-Legende

label: 🎸 Rock-Star Arena
prompt: The person from @image1 as a rock star on stage — singing into a microphone, playing electric guitar, or facing a cheering crowd, wearing gender-appropriate rock attire — for a man: a leather jacket & ripped jeans, a glam rock stage outfit, or a heavy metal shirt & boots; for a woman: a rock diva stage dress, a leather jacket & fishnet outfit, or a glam rock costume.
